concept.description: Marks :Osgi:Bundle nodes whose bundleSymbolicName matches $projectBundlePattern (Java regex) with the additional :ProjectBundle label. All metric concepts below work exclusively on :ProjectBundle. The parameter is required and has no default — set it in .jqassistant.yml under analyze.rule.parameters.projectBundlePattern.
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle) WHERE b.bundleSymbolicName =~ $projectBundlePattern CALL { WITH b SET b:ProjectBundle } IN TRANSACTIONS RETURN count(b) AS ProjectBundles

concept.description: Sums :Method.effectiveLineCount for all methods of all types contained in a project bundle. Writes :Osgi:Bundle.effectiveLineCount (0 if classes were compiled without debug line numbers).
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle:ProjectBundle) OPTIONAL MATCH (b)-[:CONTAINS*1..2]->(t:Java:Type)-[:DECLARES]->(m:Java:Method) WITH b, coalesce(sum(m.effectiveLineCount), 0) AS loc CALL { WITH b, loc SET b.effectiveLineCount = loc } IN TRANSACTIONS RETURN count(b) AS Bundles

concept.description: Computes afferent / efferent coupling and instability per project bundle, counting only edges to/from other :ProjectBundle nodes. Writes Ca, Ce, instability and the type-weighted Ca_weighted, Ce_weighted.
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle:ProjectBundle) OPTIONAL MATCH (b)-[out:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Osgi:Bundle:ProjectBundle) WITH b, count(DISTINCT target) AS Ce, coalesce(sum(out.typeDependencyCount), 0) AS CeWeighted OPTIONAL MATCH (b)<-[in:DEPENDS_ON]-(source:Osgi:Bundle:ProjectBundle) WITH b, Ce, CeWeighted, count(DISTINCT source) AS Ca, coalesce(sum(in.typeDependencyCount), 0) AS CaWeighted CALL { WITH b, Ca, Ce, CaWeighted, CeWeighted SET b.Ca = Ca, b.Ce = Ce, b.Ca_weighted = CaWeighted, b.Ce_weighted = CeWeighted, b.instability = CASE WHEN Ca + Ce = 0 THEN null ELSE 1.0 * Ce / (Ca + Ce) END } IN TRANSACTIONS RETURN count(b) AS Bundles

concept.description: A = (interface + abstract class types) / total types contained in the bundle. Writes typeCount, abstractTypeCount, abstractness on :Osgi:Bundle. Inner / anonymous types are included; null when the bundle has no types.
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle:ProjectBundle) OPTIONAL MATCH (b)-[:CONTAINS*1..2]->(t:Java:Type) WITH b, count(t) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN t:Interface OR t.abstract = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS abstr CALL { WITH b, total, abstr SET b.typeCount = total, b.abstractTypeCount = abstr, b.abstractness = CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN null ELSE 1.0 * abstr / total END } IN TRANSACTIONS RETURN count(b) AS Bundles

concept.description: Distance from the main sequence: D = | A + I - 1 |. Writes :Osgi:Bundle.distance (null if A or I is null).
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle:ProjectBundle) WITH b, CASE WHEN b.abstractness IS NULL OR b.instability IS NULL THEN null ELSE abs(b.abstractness + b.instability - 1.0) END AS d CALL { WITH b, d SET b.distance = d } IN TRANSACTIONS RETURN count(b) AS Bundles

concept.description: Sets :Osgi:Bundle.inCycle = true on bundles that participate in a cyclic DEPENDS_ON chain among project bundles, false otherwise.
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle:ProjectBundle) CALL { WITH b SET b.inCycle = false } IN TRANSACTIONS WITH count(*) AS reset MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle:ProjectBundle)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(other:Osgi:Bundle:ProjectBundle), shortestPath((other)-[:DEPENDS_ON*]->(b)) WHERE b <> other CALL { WITH b SET b.inCycle = true } IN TRANSACTIONS RETURN count(DISTINCT b) AS BundlesInCycle

constraint.description: Project bundles must not participate in cyclic Require-Bundle / package-wiring chains.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (b1:Osgi:Bundle:ProjectBundle)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(b2:Osgi:Bundle:ProjectBundle), path = allShortestPaths((b2)-[:DEPENDS_ON*]->(b1)) WHERE b1 <> b2 RETURN b1.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, [n IN nodes(path) | n.bundleSymbolicName] AS Cycle ORDER BY Bundle

concept.description: One row per project bundle with all metrics. Rendered both as a single CSV overview (target/jqassistant/report/csv/) and as per-bundle AsciiDoc fragments via templates/osgi-metrics-BundleMetricsReport.adoc.ftl (target/jqassistant/report/asciidoc/<SymbolicName>/...).
concept.cypher: MATCH (b:Osgi:Bundle:ProjectBundle) RETURN b.bundleSymbolicName AS SymbolicName, b.typeCount AS Types, b.abstractTypeCount AS AbstractTypes, b.effectiveLineCount AS LoC, b.Ca AS Ca, b.Ce AS Ce, b.Ca_weighted AS CaWeighted, b.Ce_weighted AS CeWeighted, b.instability AS I, b.abstractness AS A, b.distance AS D, b.inCycle AS InCycle ORDER BY b.distance DESC, b.bundleSymbolicName
